summary: The implementation successfully addresses all 8 requirements from the BuildRequest. All core features are present: dynamic payment form with NEFT/Cheque modes, conditional field rendering, backend storage, form submission with auto-clear, report table, Excel export, and mobile-first responsive design. No missing requirements detected, but two hallucinated features related to user authentication were implemented despite being listed as non-goals.

hallucinated_features.description: User authentication and identity management with Internet Identity
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or access control' as a non-goal, but the implementation includes InternetIdentityProvider and authentication flows

hallucinated_features.description: User-specific payment filtering and multi-user support in backend
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend includes 'user: Principal' field in Payment type and functions getPaymentsByUser/getPaymentsByInvoiceNumber, but BuildRequest non-goals explicitly exclude multi-user features
